code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_LoadBalancer] --> CLOSED

    state CLOSED {Infra_WorkerNode] --> Normal
        Normal --> IncrementFailures: execute_trade fails
        IncrementFailures --> CheckThreshold: failure_count++
        CheckThreshold --> Normal: count < 3
        CheckThreshold --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]: count >= 3

        Normal --> ResetCount: execute_trade succeeds
        ResetCount --> Normal: failure_count = 0
    }

    CLOSED --> OPEN: Threshold Reached 3 failures

    state OPEN {Infra_WorkerNode] --> BlockCalls
        BlockCalls --> CheckTimeout: All calls raise CircuitBreakerError
        CheckTimeout --> BlockCalls: elapsed < 60s
        CheckTimeout --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]: elapsed >= 60s
    }

    OPEN --> HALF_OPEN: Recovery Timeout Expired

    state HALF_OPEN {Infra_RedisCache] --> TestRecovery
        TestRecovery --> EvaluateResult: Allow ONE test call
        EvaluateResult --> [Infra_IngressController]: Success
        EvaluateResult --> ReOpen: Failure

        ReOpen --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]
    }

    HALF_OPEN --> CLOSED: Test Call Succeeds
    HALF_OPEN --> OPEN: Test Call Fails

    style CLOSED fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style OPEN fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style HALF_OPEN fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为熔断器模式画一个状态图。核心场景是：LoadBalancer后面的WorkerNode在执行交易时可能失败，连续失败3次要触发熔断，进入OPEN状态。
明白，所以初始状态是CLOSED，内部包含Normal和IncrementFailures这些子状态？失败计数达到3时，CLOSED要转换到OPEN？
对，CLOSED内部Normal处理正常交易，失败时走IncrementFailures累加，CheckThreshold判断阈值。达到3次后CLOSED整体转到OPEN。另外成功交易要ResetCount清零。
好的，我先把CLOSED状态内部结构画出来：Normal连接IncrementFailures（execute_trade fails），IncrementFailures到CheckThreshold（failure_count++），CheckThreshold分两条返回路径。
OPEN状态的设计：进入后要BlockCalls拦截所有请求，同时启动60秒超时检查。超时后不是直接恢复，而是进入HALF_OPEN试探状态。
确认一下OPEN内部：BlockCalls收到请求都抛CircuitBreakerError，CheckTimeout检查elapsed，不到60秒回BlockCalls，到了60秒转到EtcdCluster标记超时完成，然后OPEN整体转到HALF_OPEN？
没错。HALF_OPEN是关键：只允许一个测试请求，由RedisCache里的TestRecovery处理。测试结果决定是走IngressController恢复成功，还是ReOpen重新熔断。
HALF_OPEN结构已添加：TestRecovery允许一个测试调用，EvaluateResult分支——成功到IngressController，失败走ReOpen回LoadBalancer。HALF_OPEN整体也有两条转出路径到CLOSED或OPEN。
最后加颜色区分状态：CLOSED用绿色表示健康，OPEN用红色警示，HALF_OPEN用黄色提醒注意。
颜色已应用：CLOSED绿色(#4CAF50)、OPEN红色(#F44336)、HALF_OPEN黄色(#FFC107)。整个熔断器状态流转图完成了，从LoadBalancer初始进入，经过三种状态的完整生命周期。
